sub_mechanisms: M_1: target loss CDF over training budget
M_2: Skorokhod stopping time T_t aligning Brownian process to target CDF
M_3: Brownian-bridge LR schedule = path from start to T_t
M_4: per-step LR draw from stopped process
stripped_llm_application: LR schedule derived as the path of a Brownian process stopped according to a Skorokhod stopping time that aligns the loss process with a target distribution over the training budget; the schedule is interpreted as a sample path of a stopped Brownian bridge.
novelty_claim_stripped: Diffusion-model schedules include Brownian-bridge variance choices but as variance schedules for noise injection, NOT as Skorokhod-stopped LR schedules for optimizer training.
